pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17 from 8.73.0 to 8.73.1
pull_request.body:
Bumps [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) from 8.73.0 to 8.73.1.
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17's releases.

8.73.1

What's Changed

  • Python: Extend dependency recipes with scope support and package-manager-aware transitive pinning by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6715
  • Fix ChangeParentPom not fully updating submodule parent models (#6717) by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6718
  • Python - fix for method_select in TabsAndIndentsVisitor by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6711
  • Python: Fix RPC issues by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6721
  • AddOrUpdateAnnotationAttribute: Handle fully qualified enum values by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6719
  • Python - handle f-strings concatenation by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6722
  • Python: Support t-string templates and parsing (PEP 750) by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6724
  • Support Gradle 8.x on Java 23+ by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6725
  • Python: Fix formatter bugs and add comprehensive format tests by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6727
  • Python: Integrate auto-formatting into template engine by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6728
  • Fixing @ToBeRemoved annotations with invalid date by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6729
  • Python: changing how imports are parsed, prefer J.Import by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6730
  • Python: Fix f-string parsing for debug = with format spec by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6731
  • Fix anchor on MappingStart in sequence entry losing prefix by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6732
  • Add recipes for Kotlinx coroutines and serialization, based on ReplaceWith by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6561

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.73.0...v8.73.1

Commits
  • d9fa7fb Add recipes for Kotlinx coroutines and serialization, based on ReplaceWith ...
  • ab26c72 JavaScript: Fix postbuild chmod to use numeric mode
  • b65f9c0 Fix anchor on MappingStart in sequence entry losing prefix (#6732)
  • 1c396f6 Python: Fix f-string parsing for debug = with format spec (#6731)
  • ad53660 Python: changing how imports are parsed, prefer J.Import (#6730)
  • 7941fa7 JavaScript: Skip npmPublish when npmBuild is restored from cache
  • 92424ce Python: Fix corner case in printer
  • fcc44d0 There's no Feb 30 (#6729)
  • 5206a7d JavaScript: Enable Gradle build cache for NpmTask tasks
  • 398b8c4 Python: Integrate auto-formatting into template engine (#6728)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17&package-manager=maven&previous-version=8.73.0&new-version=8.73.1)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
